emails.subject: Welcome to Acme Corp - your onboarding checklist
emails.preview: Hi Demo, welcome aboard! Here is everything you need for your first week at Acme Corp.

bodyValues.html:
Welcome to Acme Corp!

Hi Demo,

Welcome aboard! Here is everything you need for your first week:

  • Set up your workstation and badge
  • Meet your onboarding buddy, John Smith
  • Review the team handbook

If anything is unclear, just reply to this email.

Best,
Jane Doe
People Operations, Acme Corp

emails.subject: Your July billing statement is ready
emails.preview: Your billing statement for July is attached. Amount due: $42.00 by August 1.

bodyValues.text:
Hello Demo User,

Your billing statement for July is attached.

Due date: August 1

Questions? Contact billing@example.com.

emails.subject: Project kickoff notes
emails.preview: Notes from this morning's kickoff: scope agreed, milestones drafted, next sync on Tuesday.

bodyValues.text:
Hi both,

Notes from this morning's kickoff:

- Scope agreed for phase one
- Milestones drafted (see project board)
- Next sync on Tuesday at 10:00

Please add anything I missed.

John

emails.subject: Re: Project kickoff notes
emails.preview: One addition: we still need a decision on the reporting format before Tuesday.

bodyValues.text:
One addition: we still need a decision on the reporting format before Tuesday.

I'd vote for the columnar layout we tested last sprint.

Bob

bodyValues.html:
